hook: Cold showers can boost your mood more than you might think.

script.hook: Cold showers can boost your mood more than you might think.
beats: Research shows that just a 2-minute cold shower can increase norepinephrine by up to 300%.
This neurotransmitter plays a key role in mood and focus, potentially helping with depression.
However, cold exposure isn't for everyone—consult your doctor if you have heart issues.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Footage of a person taking a cold shower with a surprised expression.
Graphic showing the increase in norepinephrine levels.
Clip of someone looking more focused and happy after a cold shower.
Text overlay with the caveat about consulting a doctor.
